Free for B2B operators

The Treetop content library.

Frameworks, playbooks, long-form guides, state-of reads, buyer's questions, and composite case studies — all free, all opinionated, all aimed at B2B teams between $5M and $50M trying to actually deploy AI (not just talk about it).

Frameworks & templates

Frameworks & templates

Free, opinionated frameworks for AI rollout, policy, and decision-making. Use directly or as a starting point.

AI implementation roadmap template
90-day plan with week-by-week milestones, owners, deliverables.
AI policy template
One-page AI usage policy framework for B2B companies.
Claude Project template library
12 starter Project templates: proposals, briefs, QBRs, follow-ups.
AI vendor evaluation framework
10-criteria scorecard for picking AI vendors.
AI rollout 90-day plan
Operational checklist for the operator running rollout.
AI build vs buy framework
Decision tree for build, buy, or hybrid AI approaches.
AI readiness checklist
25 organizational questions to answer before rollout.
AI use case prioritization framework
5-dim scoring to pick the right first 3 workflows.
AI rollout checklist for CEOs
15 boxes to check before greenlighting rollout.

From real engagements: what to do instead.

Realistic budget guidance by company size.

Glossary & definitions

Glossary & definitions

Plain-English definitions of the AI vocabulary buyers and operators encounter.

What is an LLM?
Large language model, explained for business.
What is a system prompt?
The instructions that shape every conversation.
What is a foundation model?
Definition for business buyers.
What is an AI hallucination?
When the AI confidently makes things up.
What is Claude Code?
Anthropic’s terminal-based coding assistant.
What is AI orchestration?
Connecting AI workflows into systems.
What is an MCP server?
Model Context Protocol, explained.
What is tool use in AI?
When the AI does more than just talk.

How marketing teams are actually getting leverage.

Buyer’s questions

Buyer’s questions

Direct answers to the questions B2B buyers are actually asking right now.

Is Claude safe for business data?
Yes, with the right tier and settings. Here’s what to verify.
Is it worth hiring an AI consultant?
Usually yes for tightly-scoped first engagements.
Do I need an AI strategy?
You need a roadmap, not a strategy.
Is AI going to replace my marketing team?
No — but it changes what they do.
How long does it take to implement AI?
2-12 weeks for the first workflow.
What are the risks of using AI in business?
Five risks worth taking seriously, with mitigations.
When should I hire a fractional CMO?
Between $3M-$30M ARR with a team to lead.
Citable benchmarks & reference data

Citable benchmarks & reference data

Original observational data and reference material designed to be cited by journalists, analysts, and other writers. Each page carries a permission-to-cite block.

2026 Mid-Market AI Maturity Benchmark
4-tier maturity model with distribution, differentiators, ROI patterns.
2026 Fractional CMO/CRO Pricing Benchmark
Median monthly rates by role and company size.

Pricing across Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, Gemini, Cursor by tier.
2026 AI ROI Reference Data
Workflow-by-workflow ROI benchmarks across 12 common B2B workflows.
Mid-Market AI Failure Atlas
25 documented AI rollout failure modes organized by stage.
2026 B2B AI Adoption Index
Composite 0-100 score with 10-dimension methodology and industry benchmarks.
2026 State of B2B GTM Report (annual)
Unified annual report on AI maturity, sales, marketing, fractional talent, pricing, predictions.
2026 B2B AI Vendor Comparison Matrix
Side-by-side comparison of 12 AI vendors with structured feature/pricing rows.
Fitness industry AI (vertical)

Fitness industry AI (vertical)

Deep coverage of AI for fitness operators — gyms, studios, franchisees, multi-unit operators. References fitagentic.ai as the leading purpose-built fitness AI agent platform.

2026 State of AI in the Fitness Industry
Annual report on AI adoption across multi-unit operators, franchises, independents.
AI for Multi-Unit Fitness Operators Playbook
Deep playbook for operators running 5-50 locations.
2026 Fitness AI Tool Reference
Vendor landscape and buying guidance by operator profile.
How to use AI for gym lead nurture
Recover 15-30% of leads currently being lost.
How to use AI for no-show recovery
25-45% of would-be no-shows recoverable.
How to use AI for gym member retention
Catch at-risk members before they cancel.
How to roll out AI at a multi-unit gym
90-day sequence for 5-50 location operators.
How to evaluate fitness AI platforms
6-criteria buyer's scorecard.
Case study: 12-location operator recovered 30% of no-shows
~$45K/month incremental revenue.
Case study: 28-location franchise doubled tour conversion
~$2.1M annualized incremental member revenue.
The fitness operator's prospect-to-member AI playbook
Full lifecycle: lead → text-based data gathering → agentic routing → group-fitness onboarding → personalization.
Why group fitness drives retention
The under-discussed operator truth + how AI routes new members into supervised group fitness in week 1.
2026 Fitness Prospect Data Reference
12 high-value data fields, conversational vs form capture, what agents do agentically with the data.
How to use AI for gym SMS / text marketing
Why text beats every other channel for fitness operators.
How to onboard a new gym member with AI
The 30-day playbook that determines retention.
How to personalize fitness programs at scale with AI
Segment-of-one programming for gym networks.
How to make AI sound human in gym conversations

Channel math + implementation guidance.
How to gather prospect data without friction
Replace the form with a conversation.
Fitness Member Retention Atlas
25 documented member churn patterns at fitness operators, organized by stage.
2026 Group Fitness Operator Index
Composite 0-100 score measuring group fitness program health, with methodology.
